title:
Hey bros listen up no cap no filter just facts about my AGX play that proves I got the sharpest eyes in the game
Back in 2024 when AGX was floating around 49 I pulled the trigger and loaded up nobody was talking about this gem back then everyone was too busy chasing the flashy AI stocks that fizzled
author: Alone_Kick_4571
selftext:
Let’s keep it real in April 2024 AGX was hovering right around that 49 mark even dipping to 48.96 some days most people thought it was just another boring small-cap going nowhere but I saw the potential others missed



Fast forward to now AGX is blowing past all expectations hitting all-time highs cracking 550 and still climbing remember 2024 alone it already surged 192.88 from the start of the year closing at 137.04 by December 31



I didn’t get lucky I did my homework I saw the AI power infrastructure wave coming before it was mainstream AGX builds the gas plants and grid infrastructure that AI data centers need and their backlog hit 29B doubling from the year before that’s not a fluke that’s fundamentals



From 49 to over 550 that’s a massive gain and I locked it in before Wall Street caught on before JPMorgan upgraded it before the earnings blew the roof off this isn’t just a win this is proof that my eyes are unmatched my strength speaks for itself



All the haters who laughed when I bought at 49 where you at now AGX isn’t a overnight pump it’s a long-term play I called months ago and now everyone’s jumping on the bandwagon



To all my fellow traders this is how you play it trust your gut do your research and don’t follow the crowd I saw the value when AGX was under the radar and now I’m reaping the rewards



Holding strong and still counting the gains AGX isn’t done yet but even if it was that 49 entry already cemented my spot as someone who knows how to pick winners strength doesn’t lie and neither does these gains
